title: Pyrex Oval Casserole with Lid Classic Glass, Transparent, 6.3 cm, 4.0 L
description: Product Description Pyrex, a committed French brand! At Pyrex, we are committed to a free and uninhibited style of cooking, free from codes of perfection. For over 100 years, our Pyrex cookware and storage containers have been inspired by a love of French cuisine. Our commitment is to develop and produce healthy and durable glass products in our French factory, suitable for a wide range of uses! Previous page ‘4 in 1’, our range for oven cooking! Our casseroles can be adapted to every situation: cooking, storing, serving and reheating! serve at the table An elegant dish, perfect for serving directly at the table! Heat-retaining lid Dishwasher safe Hygienic material that won't accumulate stains or odours Easy to wash Cook and reheat Oven safe, lid included Wide handles for easy handling Deep dish Store the leftovers directly in the dish Store your food directly in the casserole! Resists thermal shock Next page 1 Discover 4 in 1 2 serve at the table 3 Easy to wash 4 Cook and reheat 5 Store Discover the 4 in 1 range ! 2 glass casseroles 2 size Add To Basket 2 glass casseroles 1.6L Buying Options 2 glass casseroles 1L Add To Basket 2 glass casseroles 2.3L Add To Basket 2 glass casseroles 2 size Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 188 — 4.5 out of 5 stars 192 4.5 out of 5 stars 192 4.6 out of 5 stars 372 Price £25.89 £ 25 . 89 — £29.89 £ 29 . 89 £34.49 £ 34 . 49 — Oven safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Microwave safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Serve at the table ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Scratch resistance ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Dishwasher safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Freeze & Fridge safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Reusable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Pyrex Borosilicate glass ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Made in France ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Ideal for — — — — — The video showcases the product in use. A COMMITMENT MADE TO LAST Sustainable products We are committed to bringing the highest quality cookware to every home in the world. Preserving our environment Our aim is to continually reduce our CO2 emissions, improve waste management and minimise our footprint on the planet. French manufacturing Pyrex glass has been made in France since 1970, symbolising the excellence of the French glass industry thanks to unrivalled expertise. Stop food waste! At Pyrex, we fight food waste with the conviction that food that is better preserved and consumed is also food that is thrown away less. Previous page Next page
